summary.post_title: How to set up SSL on Nginx
summary.content_preview: This step-by-step guide walks you through configuring SSL/TLS on an Nginx web server using Let's Encrypt. We cover certbot installation, generating a free certificate, configuring nginx.conf for HTTPS, redirecting HTTP to HTTPS, enabling HTTP/2, and setting up automatic renewal via cron. Common pitfalls include misconfigured server blocks, mismatched certificate paths, and SELinux denying access to private keys. By the end you'll have an A+ rating on SSL Labs and a hardened TLS setup.
